items.title: Listings for Europe (Germany, Switzerland e.g.)
items.description:
### Feature Request and/or Repo Idea

Can you also add listings for Europe without the specification : "AI related jobs"
Maybe a different repo for eu new grad jobs/internships.
Listing Big Tech companies that hire in EU would save so much time.
Sincerely.
